title: Node
description: A single markdown file in the graph (skill, agent, command, hook, note). Identified by its relative path from the scope root.

path.description: Relative path from the scope root. Canonical node identifier in v0. Survives frontmatter edits; breaks on file moves (rare enough). FUTURE: a sibling `id` field (UUID stored in frontmatter) lands with write-back to decouple identity from location; `path` will remain as display metadata at that point. Stability: stable.

kind.description: Category assigned by the adapter. Stability: stable. New kinds may be added in a minor bump.

adapter.description: Identifier of the adapter extension that classified this node (e.g. `claude`).

title.description: Human-readable title. Sourced from frontmatter `name` or falls back to filename. Null if neither is usable.

description.description: Short description from frontmatter `description`. Null if absent.

version.description: Denormalized from `metadata.version` for fast queries. Must be a valid semver if present.

bodyHash.description: sha256 of the body content (post-frontmatter), hex-encoded lowercase. Used for rename heuristic (high confidence) and stale detection.

frontmatterHash.description: sha256 of the raw frontmatter block, hex-encoded lowercase. Used for rename heuristic (medium confidence).

bytes.description: Size breakdown in bytes: frontmatter, body, total.

tokens.description: Size breakdown in tokens (via `js-tiktoken`): frontmatter, body, total. Optional; MAY be absent if tokenization was disabled.

linksOutCount.description: Outgoing links from this node to other graph nodes.

linksInCount.description: Incoming links from other graph nodes to this one.

externalRefsCount.description: http/https URLs in the body after normalization and exact-match dedup.
